text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Apparently people from the shopping district in
Kokura are coming to see the race today.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Kokura's so far from here. Why would they
bother?
choice_data_list:
Because getting to root for you is worth any
trouble.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Grrr... Again with your cheesy remarks...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: But it's true they're all rooting for me.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
...I have to win, then. After all, their support is
what led me here.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I have to give it my all... no matter how fast the
others are.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's probably talking about Mejiro McQueen
and Mejiro Ryan.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Having gained new rivals, Nice Nature is... fired
up!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: I can't let them see me fail.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: I can do it... I can run just as fast as those runners!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I'll run with all I got—all the way to the top of the
podium!
